title: Lock and Key
body:
## Lock and Key A 1.20.1 RPG survival [Chunklock](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chunklock) modpack. It combines [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz), [PartyAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/partyaddon), [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog), and Chunklock, as well as several other optimization mods, and quality of life to provide a challenging exploration ModPack!
Feedback


Mod List

Check out the mods I'm using!
